privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in task.json are verified correct. The task involves 5 real academic papers in Trash (Shannon 1948, Turing 1950, Dijkstra 1959, Vaswani et al. 2017, Goodfellow et al. 2014) to be restored and added to a collection called 'Thesis References' alongside 3 existing papers already in the collection (Devlin et al. 2019, He et al. 2016, Krizhevsky et al. 2012). All 8 papers are landmark works in their respective fields with correct titles and years. The data setup is synthetic (papers manually seeded into Zotero database) but uses real academic papers.
